line: // Tier B stress fixture: plausible, sectional KQL for hand review.
// Unicode sentinels: café, λ, 東京, 🚀, 𝌆.
// Scalar declarations and every datatype family recognized by the grammar.
// Numeric spellings: decimal, exponent, hexadecimal, and suffix variants.
// All supported quote styles and closed multiline string state.

ruleStack: [(1, source.kusto, source.kusto),(17, source.kusto string.quoted.multi.kusto, source.kusto string.quoted.multi.kusto)]
[(1, source.kusto, source.kusto),(17, source.kusto string.quoted.multi.kusto, source.kusto string.quoted.multi.kusto)]

line: second line has café, λ, 東京, 🚀, and 𝌆
ruleStack: [(1, source.kusto, source.kusto),(17, source.kusto string.quoted.multi.kusto, source.kusto string.quoted.multi.kusto)]

line: third line keeps // text inside the string

[(1, source.kusto, source.kusto),(17, source.kusto string.quoted.multi.kusto, source.kusto string.quoted.multi.kusto)]

line: // A compact source table with typed columns and nested dynamic values.
// Core pipeline: filters, scalar functions, projection, ordering, and aliases.
| project Timestamp, User, Region, SafeScore, Count, Latency, Tags, Properties,
Message, Lower, Upper, Length, Hash, EventDay, EventWeek, Age, PreviousDay
// String and membership operators, including case-sensitive forms and regex.
| where Region startswith "eu" or Region endswith_cs "east"
| where Message has "code" and Message has_any ("login", "retry")
| project User, Region, Code, Replaced, Parts, Prefix
| order by Code asc nulls first;
| project Timestamp, Rounded, Root, Power, Trig, TenMinute, Fixed, Stamp, Duration, Unix;
| sort by EventDay desc, Average desc
// Distinct, count, top, sample, and range tabular operators.
Normalized | top-hitters 3 of Region by Count;
// Joins, lookup, union, and qualified join-side names.
| join kind=leftouter hint.strategy=broadcast Users on User
union withsource=SourceName Normalized, (Events | project Timestamp, User, Region, Score, Count,
// Dynamic bags and arrays, expansion, application, and packing.
| project-keep Timestamp, User, Region, Score, prop_*;
// Parsing families and extraction from semi-structured text.
| parse Message with Action:string " code=" Status:int
| parse-kv KvText as (mode:string, retries:int, owner:string) with (pair_delimiter=",", kv_delimiter="=")
| project Action, Status, RequiredStatus, mode, retries, owner, Csv, Url, Command;
// Time series construction and series scalar functions.
from datetime(2026-07-01) to datetime(2026-07-15) step 1d by Region
| project Region, Timestamp, Total, Smoothed, Stats, Decomposition;
// Less common tabular operators remain small and reviewable.
Recent=(where Timestamp > ago(2d) | project User, Timestamp),
| facet by Region with (summarize Average=avg(Score) by Active);
// Metadata, external references, plugins, and rendering keywords.
| render timechart with (title="café / 東京 🚀", ytitle='score λ 𝌆');
// Deprecated spellings are intentional grammar coverage, not recommendations.
